app.name: VORTEX
app.welcomeHint: Khetha igumbi noma wenze elisha. Ukuxhumana kusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi — inethiwekhi yendawo kuphela.
app.welcomeSub: Khetha igumbi noma wenze elisha. Ukuxhumana kusebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi — inethiwekhi yendawo kuphela.

auth.keyNotFound: Ukhiye oyimfihlo wale akhawunti awutholakali. Ngena ngemvume ngephasiwedi.
auth.subtitle: Umthumeli-myalezo P2P Ongenasikhungo
auth.keyExpiredEnterPassword: Ukhiye uphelelwe yisikhathi. Faka iphasiwedi ye-@{username}:
auth.confirmRemoveAccount: Susa i-akhawunti ohlwini? I-akhawunti ngokwayo ngeke isuswe.
auth.seedPhraseMustBe24Words: Ibinzana lembewu kumele libe namagama angama-24
auth.fillNameAndAllAnswers: Gcwalisa igama kanye nazo zonke izimpendulo ezi-3
auth.seedPhraseWarning: Londoloza lawa magama angama-24! Ziboniswa KANYE kuphela.
auth.seedPhraseHint: Uma ukhohlwa iphasiwedi yakho, lo musho uwukuphela kwendlela yokuthola i-akhawunti yakho. Kubhale phansi ephepheni futhi ukugcine endaweni ephephile.

rooms.emptyHint: Awekho amagumbi — dala noma joyina elilodwa

chat.waitingKeyHistory: Ulinda ukhiye wegumbi ukuze uvule umlando
chat.keyUpdated: Ukhiye wegumbi ubuyekezwe. Ulinda ukhiye omusha...
chat.encryptedTooltip: Umbhalo obethelwe (E2E). Ukususa ukubethela kwenziwa ohlangothini lweklayenti.

saved.noSavedHint: Sebenzisa imenyu yengqikithi yomlayezo ukuze ugcine imilayezo

tasks.noTasks: Ayikho imisebenzi. Engeza umsebenzi wakho wokuqala ngenhla.
tasks.title: Imisebenzi

settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.name: Igama
settings.geoFailed: Yehluleka ukuqinisekisa indawo. Hlola ukuthi i-GPS/Wi-Fi ikhona.
settings.geoTimeout: Isikhathi sokuthola indawo sifile. Zama endaweni evulekile.
settings.speaker: Somlomo
settings.ttlPrompt: Ngemuva kwezinsuku ezingaki zokungasebenzi kufanele i-akhawunti isuswe?
settings.sqQuestion1: Kwakuyiliphi igama lesilwane esifuywayo sakho sokuqala?
settings.sqQuestion3: Iyiphi ifilimu yakho yasebuntwaneni owawuyithanda kakhulu?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Uma ukhohlwe iphasiwedi yakho, ungakwazi ukuthola ukufinyelela ngokuphendula imibuzo emi-3. Ungasebenzisa eyakho imibuzo noma ezenzakalelayo.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Ukuhlola kwanyanga zonke - qiniseka ukuthi uyayikhumbula iphasiwedi yakho yokungena.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Sincoma ukuthi ubuyekeze iphasiwedi yakho ngenkathi ungene ngemvume, ukuze ungalahlekelwa ukufinyelela.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Sula inqolobane yemidiya nedatha yesikhashana?

Okhiye bokubethela nezilungiselelo NGEKE kusulwe.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Iseshini kufanele isebenze okungenani izinsuku eziyi-7 ukuze ushintshe iphasiwedi.

Isikhathi esisele: {daysLeft} izinsuku.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Izinsuku eziyisi-7 azikadluli. Sicela ulinde izinsuku ezingu-{daysLeft} ngaphezulu.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Ukufinyelela kwe-geolocation kunqatshiwe.

1. i-macOS: Izilungiselelo Zesistimu → Ubumfihlo → Amasevisi Endawo → vumela isiphequluli
2. Isiphequluli: chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela
3. Layisha kabusha ikhasi
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Ukufinyelela kwe-geolocation kunqatshiwe.

Chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela, bese ulayisha kabusha ikhasi

call.groupCallNotice: Ikholi yeqembu — wonke amalungu egumbi azothola isimemo

bots.installSuccess: I-bot ifakiwe! Yengeze ekamelweni kusukela kuzilungiselelo zekamelwa.
bots.nameTooShort: Igama le-bot kufanele libe nezinhlamvu ezingu-2 okungenani
bots.noMiniAppUrl: Ayikho i-URL ye-Mini App elungiselelwe le-bot.
bots.regenerateTokenConfirm: Khiqiza kabusha ithokheni? Ithokheni endala izoyeka ukusebenza.
bots.noBotsCreateHint: Awunawo ama-bot. Dala i-bot kokuthi Izilungiselelo → Amabhothi

poll.explanationPlaceholder: Por que esta resposta está correta...
poll.enterQuestionAndOptions: Digite uma pergunta e pelo menos 2 opções

stickers.noStickersHint: Azikho izitikha okwamanje. Chofoza + noma hudula izithombe ukuze uzingeze.

channel.author: Umbhali
channel.signaturesHint: Bonisa igama lombhali ngaphansi kokuthunyelwe kwabo
channel.hashtagsHint: Ama-hashtag angu-# achofozekayo ukuze azulazule esiteshini

fingerprint.aimCamera: Bhekisa ikhamera ku-QR code yomuntu omunye
fingerprint.emojiHint: Izinhlangothi zombili kufanele zibone i-emoji efanayo. Qhathanisa ngokwesiqu noma ngomgwaqo owuvikelekile.
fingerprint.showQR: Bonisa i-QR code ukuze umuntu omunye ayiskene
fingerprint.title: Ukuqinisekiswa kokhiye
fingerprint.pointCamera: Khomba ikhamera kukhodi ye-QR yomunye umuntu

panic.callSettingsNote: Qaphela: Izindlela ze-Force TCP ne-Relay zinganda ukulibazeka kodwa zinikeze ubumfihlo obukhulu. Ukumbonya ithrafikhi kwengeza imboza engahleliwe emisebenzini ye-SDP.
panic.desc: Yonke idatha kule node izosuswa unaphakade. Lesi senzo asinakuguqulwa.
panic.warningBody:
Usuzoqeda unomphela yonke idatha.
Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Konke ukulandela kususiwe. Lesi sikhathi sesiphelile.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Uma ukhiye omusha wekamelwa utholakala — thumela ngokuzenzakalelayo kuwo wonke amadivayisi akho (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Khopha okhiye bonke ngegama eligciniwe futhi ulondoloze ezikhundleni. Ngoguquko lwedivayisi — buyisela ngegama elilodwa.
privacy.crossSignHint: Qinisekisa amadivayisi amasha ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesiginesha se-HMAC (ukuvikelwa ngenguqulelo)
privacy.federatedHint: Saba izingxenye zebekap ezifihliwe kuma-nodes efederation. Ngisho uma isikhundla silahlekile — buyisela ngezihlobo.
privacy.historySyncHint: Ikhophi yemiyalezo efihliwe itholakala kuwo wonke amadivayisi. Isikhundla sibona umsindo nje
privacy.ktHint: Irekhodi lokwengeza kuphela lawo wonke uguquko lokhiye womphakathi ngomgogodla we-hash (Merkle). Isikhundla siyasayina inguma ngayinye — ubuqili butholakala ngesikhathi sohlolo.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Dlulisela okhiye kudivayisi entsha ngekhodi yamNumber 6. Okhiye bafihliwe nge-ECIES — isikhundla asakwazi ukubafunda.
privacy.ssssHint: Hlukanisa ukhiye oyinhloko izingxenye ezingu-N. Izingxenye ezingu-M ziyobuyisela ukhiye. Ingxenye ngayinye ifihliwe nomxhumani othembekile othile (ECIES). Isikhundla sibona ama-blobs afihliwe kuphela.
privacy.title: Ubumfihlo

contactSync.title: Thola oxhumana nabo
contactSync.desc: Hlola ukuthi yibaphi oxhumana nabo befoni yakho asebevele baku-Vortex. Izinombolo zocingo ziyashesha — iseva ayiziboni.
contactSync.noMatches: Abekho othintana nabo abatholakele ku-Vortex okwamanje
contactSync.stats: Uhlole izinombolo ezingu-{checked}, kwatholakala oxhumana nabo abangu-{found}

errors.noMiniAppUrl: Ayikho i-URL yohlelo lokusebenza oluncane elungiselelwe le bot.

ide.noBotToken: Le phrojekthi ayinayo isethi ye-Bot Token.
ide.simulatorHint: Bhala Gravitix ikhodi futhi uhlole i-bot yakho lapha ngesikhathi sangempela.
ide.noBotsYet:
Awekho ama-bot alondoloziwe okwamanje.
Engeza ithokheni kuphrojekthi ekhona kuqala.
ide.noBotTokenAlert:
Le phrojekthi ayinayo isethi ye-Bot Token.
Hlela iphrojekthi bese wengeza ithokheni yakho ye-bot Telegram kuqala.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Umushwana wokungena kumele okungenani ube nezinhlamvu eziyi-8
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Faka le khodi kudivayisi yakho enkulu
keyBackup.minTwoContacts: Oxhumana nabo abathembekile okungenani abangu-2 nomkhawulo ≥ 2
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Faka umushwana wokungena ukuze ubethelwe. Khumbula - ukululama ngaphandle kwakho akunakwenzeka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Faka umushwana wokungena owusebenzisile ngenkathi udala isipele.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Susa ukwenza isipele kokhiye? Lesi senzo asinakuhlehliswa.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Hoxisa konke ukwabelana ngokhiye? Ukubuyisela ngoxhumana nabo abathembekile ngeke kwenzeke.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Ukhiye wakho oyinhloko uzohlukaniswa abe amasheya angu-N kusetshenziswa i-Shamir scheme. Noma yikuphi ukwabelana kwe-M kuzovumela ukutholwa kokhiye. Isabelo ngasinye sibethelwe koxhumana naye othile othembekile.
keyBackup.thresholdRange: Umkhawulo kufanele usuke ku-2 ukuya ku-{max}
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Okungenani ontanga abasebenzayo abangu-2 abanokubethela kuyadingeka
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Susa ikhophi yasenqolobaneni ehlanganisiwe? Amashadi kontanga azohlala, kodwa imethadatha izolahleka.

location.macStep1: 1. i-macOS: Okuthandwayo Kwesistimu → Ubumfihlo → Amasevisi Endawo → vumela isiphequluli
location.macStep2: 2. Isiphequluli: chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela
location.otherBrowserHint: Chofoza isithonjana sokukhiya kubha yekheli → Indawo → Vumela, bese ulayisha kabusha ikhasi

ssl.skippedHttp: ⚡ I-SSL yeqiwe. I-Node izosebenza ngaphezu kwe-HTTP.

upload.chunkFailed: I-Chunk {chunk} ihlulekile ngemva kokuzama kabusha okungu-{retries}
upload.csrfNotFound: Ithokheni ye-CSRF ayitholakali — sicela uqale kabusha ikhasi.

pageBuilder.dropHint: Hudula amafayela lapha noma chofoza ukuze ukhethe

botConstructor.title: I-Bot Constructor
botConstructor.subtitle: Yakha i-bot yakho ngokubukeka - ayikho ikhodi edingekayo
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Umlayezo wokwamukela uma umsebenzisi eqala i-bot...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Siyakwamukela! Ngiyibhot yakho. Sebenzisa /siza ukubona imiyalo.
botConstructor.docsCommand: Iphendula lapho umsebenzisi ethumela umyalo othile (isb. /help, /start). Ungangeza izinyathelo zengxoxo ukuze udale izingxoxo ezinezinyathelo eziningi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Iphendula lapho umlayezo womsebenzisi ufana nephethini. Isebenzisa i-regex - isb. "sawubona|hi" ifanelana namagama womabili. Akuzwakali.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Umlayezo wokuqala abasebenzisi abawubonayo lapho beqala i-bot nge/start. Yonke i-bot kufanele ibe neyodwa.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Ithumela umlayezo ngokuzenzakalelayo kushejuli. Kulungele izikhumbuzi zansuku zonke, izinhlabamkhosi zamasonto onke, noma izimemezelo zezikhathi ezithile.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Ihlanganisa i-bot logic. Hlola okokufaka okuhlukile noma komsebenzisi bese uphendula ngendlela ehlukile ngokusekelwe kumphumela.
botConstructor.docsRandom: I-Bot ikhetha impendulo eyodwa ngokungahleliwe ohlwini. Ilungele amahlaya, amathiphu, ukubingelela, noma izimpendulo ezihlukahlukene.
botConstructor.docsApi: Yenza isicelo se-HTTP ku-API yangaphandle futhi isebenzisa impendulo kumlayezo we-bot. Sebenzisa okuthi {data.field} ukuze ubhekise izinkambu zokuphendula.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Ithumela isaziso kumphathi wegumbi uma icushwa. Iwusizo ngezexwayiso, izaziso zabasebenzisi abasha, noma ukulinganisela.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Engeza izinyathelo ku-Command block ukuze udale izingxoxo ezisebenzisanayo. Isinyathelo ngasinye sibuza umbuzo, silinda impendulo yomsebenzisi, bese siyilondoloza kokuhlukile. Sebenzisa okuhlukile empendulweni yokugcina ethi {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Sebenzisa abakaki abagoqekile {variable} kumbhalo wokuphendula ukuze ufake amanani aguqukayo. Izimo eziguquguqukayo ziyaqhubeka kuyo yonke imilayezo.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Okuguquguqukayo okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kuyatholakala kuyo yonke impendulo:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Qala ngebhulokhi Yokwamukela — yinto yokuqala abasebenzisi abayibonayo
botConstructor.docsTip2: Engeza umyalo /help obala yonke imiyalo etholakalayo
botConstructor.docsTip3: Sebenzisa izinyathelo zengxoxo zokubhalisa, izinhlolovo, noma ukuqoqwa kwedatha
botConstructor.docsTip4: Hlanganisa amabhlogo weSimo ngokuguquguqukayo ukuze uthole i-smart branching
botConstructor.docsTip5: Hlola i-bot yakho ngokukhuluma nayo ekamelweni ngemva kokuyiphakela

gravitixDocs.title: I-Gravitix Language Reference
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ulimi lokubhala olusebenza kahle lokwakha ama-bots. 96 izici. I-rust backend.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: I-Gravitix iwulimi oluqondene nesizinda esithile (i-DSL) eklanywe kusukela phansi ukuze ibhale ama-Vortex bots. Lapho ezinye izilimi zidinga amalabhulali, ama-callbacks, ne-boilerplate, i-Gravitix ikunikeza izibambi zomcimbi ezisezingeni lokuqala, ukugeleza kwengxoxo, nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi — konke ku-syntax ehlanzekile, efundekayo egqugquzelwe yi-Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Iyafundeka — ikhodi ifundeka njengenhloso, hhayi umshini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — amaphutha ezinhlobo ezimile ngaphambi kwesikhathi sokusebenza
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive — ukugeleza, onogada, nokumataniswa kwephethini kwakhelwe ngaphakathi
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal — awekho amakilasi, awekho amafa, awekho izinhlaka okumele zifundwe
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: I-Gravitix eyanoma ubani ofuna ukwakha i-Vortex bot ngokushesha - kungakhathaliseki ukuthi awukaze ubhale ikhodi ngaphambili, noma ungunjiniyela ongumakadebona okhathele i-Python boilerplate. Lesi sithenjwa sifundisa i-Gravitix kusuka ezimisweni zokuqala: asikho isipiliyoni sangaphambili esidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Isigaba ngasinye sakhela kwezidlule. Uma umusha ekwenzeni izinhlelo, funda ukusuka phezulu kuye phansi. Uma usulwazi olunye ulimi, sebenzisa ithebula lokuqukethwe ukuze ugxumele kulokho okuthakaselayo.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Indlela eshesha kakhulu ukusuka ku-zero ukuya ku-bot esebenzayo.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on/start {... } — ichaza isibambi esisebenza lapho umsebenzisi ethumela /qalisa. khipha "..." - ithumela umlayezo emuva kumsebenzisi. {ctx.first_name} — ihumusha igama lokuqala lomsebenzisi kuyunithi yezinhlamvu.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ku-Gravitix IDE, chofoza inkinobho ethi Qalisa kubha ephezulu. Faka i-Vortex Bot Token yakho uma utshelwa. I-bot iqala ngokushesha - asikho isinyathelo sokwakha esidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Lonke uhlelo lwe-Gravitix lwakhiwe kusuka kumabhulokhi wokwakha amathathu ayisisekelo: izibambi, izitatimende ezikhiphayo, nokunengqondo.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Lonke inani ku-Gravitix linohlobo. Isistimu yohlobo imile: izinhlobo ziyahlolwa ngesikhathi sokuhlanganiswa, ngaphambi kokuthi i-bot yakho iqalise.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Ama-opharetha ahlanganisa amanani ukuze akhiqize amanani amasha.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Izintambo ku-Gravitix ziwumbhalo obhalwe ngekhodi we-UTF-8. Basekela ukuhumusha okucebile kanye nohlu lwemisebenzi eyakhelwe ngaphakathi.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Iphethini-fanisa inani ngokumelene namaphethini amaningi. Kucabange njengesitatimende esinamandla sokushintsha.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Imisebenzi ingamabhulokhi ekhodi asebenziseka kabusha. Zikusiza ukuthi ugweme ukuphindaphinda futhi zenze ikhodi iqondeke kalula.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Izibambi ziyinhliziyo ye-Gravitix bot. Isibambi ngasinye silalela uhlobo oluthile lomcimbi futhi siqalisa lapho lowo mcimbi wenzeka.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Onogada bakuvumela ukuthi wengeze umbandela kusibambi. Isibambi sisebenza kuphela uma unogada ehlola ukuthi kuyiqiniso.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Into ye-ctx itholakala ngokuzenzakalelayo ngaphakathi kwaso sonke isibambi. Iqukethe ulwazi mayelana nomlayezo wamanje kanye nomsebenzisi owuthumele.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: I-State ivumela i-bot yakho ikhumbule izinto phakathi kwemilayezo. Ngaphandle kwesimo, yonke imilayezo izimele futhi i-bot ayinayo inkumbulo.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Ukugeleza kukuvumela ukuthi ubhale izingxoxo ezinezinyathelo eziningi ngendlela ewumugqa, efundekayo. Ukugeleza kungama isikhashana futhi kulinde umlayezo olandelayo womsebenzisi.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Qalisa ikhodi ngokuzenzakalelayo kushejuli — ayikho imisebenzi ye-cron, azikho izinsiza zangaphandle ezidingekayo.
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: I-opharetha yepayipi |> idlulisa inani njenge-agumenti yokuqala kumsebenzi olandelayo. Yenza imisebenzi ye-chaining ifundeke, ukusuka kwesobunxele kuye kwesokudla.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: I-Gravitix ihlinzeka ngokuphathwa kwephutha elihlelekile nge-try / catch / ekugcineni ivimba.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Izakhiwo zikuvumela ukuthi uqoqe idatha ehlobene ngaphansi kohlobo oluqanjwe igama. I-Enums ichaza isethi evaliwe yokuhluka.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: I-Gravitix ithumela umtapo wolwazi wezibalo onemisebenzi engu-~180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: I-Gravitix inohlobo lwendabuko oluyinkimbinkimbi - ipheya ye-64-bit entantayo emele izingxenye zangempela nezicatshangelwayo.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: I-Gravitix ihlanganisa i-calculus yezinombolo: okuphuma kokunye nezihlanganisi ezibalwe emisebenzini engafanele.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: I-algebra yomugqa yizibalo zamavekhtha kanye nomatikuletsheni.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Ithiyori yezinombolo icwaninga izici zama-integers. Isisekelo se-cryptography yesimanje.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Izibalo zinikeza amathuluzi okuchaza, ukuhlaziya, kanye nokwenza iziphetho ngedatha.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Imisebenzi ekhethekile iyizixazululo zezibalo ezibalulekile ezihlukanisayo.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Uguquko lweFourier lubolisa isignali kumafrikhwensi akhona.
gravitixDocs.bp3: Sebenzisa onogada esikhundleni se-if-chain ukuze uthole izimvume
gravitixDocs.bp5: Sebenzisa ukubuyisela kusenesikhathi ukuze unciphise ukuzalela
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Indlela engcono kakhulu yokufunda iGravitix ukwakha. Qala nge-echo bot elula, bese wengeza isimo, bese wengeza ukugeleza. Umqondo ngamunye omusha owufundayo uvula amathuba engeziwe.

bestpractices.h3: 3. Sebenzisa guards esikhundleni se-if-chain ukuze uthole izimvume
bestpractices.h5: 5. Sebenzisa kusenesikhathi return ukuze unciphise ukuzalela
bestpractices.p1: Amaphethini nemikhuba eyenza i-Gravitix bots yakho ithembeke kakhulu, ifundeke, futhi ilondolozeke.
bestpractices.p2: Yonke i-bot kufanele ibe nokubuyela emuva on msg isibambi ukuze abasebenzisi bahlale bethola impendulo:
bestpractices.p3: Ungalokothi ucabange ukuthi okuthunyelwe ngumsebenzisi kuvumelekile:
bestpractices.p4: Gcina izibambi zifushane. Hambisa ingqondo eyinkimbinkimbi emisebenzini eqanjwe igama:
bestpractices.p6: Indlela engcono kakhulu yokufunda Gravitix ukwakha. Qala nge-simple echo bot, bese wengeza state, bese wengeza flows. Umqondo ngamunye omusha owufundayo uvula amathuba engeziwe.

bitwise.p1: Ama-opharetha we-Bitwise asebenza ngokuqondile ekumeleleni okunambambili kwamanani aphelele. Inombolo ngayinye iyivelu esayiniwe engu-64-bit; i-bitwise ops iyithatha njengokulandelana kwamabhithi angu-64.

builtins.cc5: phrinta/log yamukela noma iyiphi inombolo yezimpikiswano zanoma yiluphi uhlobo:
builtins.p1: Gravitix ihlanganisa umtapo wezincwadi ojwayelekile. Yonke imisebenzi eyakhelwe ngaphakathi ihlale ikhona - akukho ukungenisa okudingekayo.
builtins.p2: Ibala i-syntax yendlela yokusekela yocingo ngaphezu kwemisebenzi ezimele:
builtins.p3: Funda amanani endaweni OS — iwusizo ezimfihlakalweni ezifana nokhiye API:
builtins.p4: Ungabhali API okhiye noma amathokheni ngokuqondile kufayela lakho .grav. Sebenzisa env("KEY_NAME") bese usetha okuhlukile endaweni yakho yokusebenzisa.
builtins.p5: Le misebenzi iphrinta kukhonsoli yeseva — ayibonakali kubasebenzisi, iwusizo ngesikhathi sokuthuthukiswa:
builtins.td10: Hlola ukuthi uchungechunge oluncane lukhona yini
builtins.td29: Guqula ibe inamba (ifinyeza float, i-cosa str)
builtins.td34: Intambo yephedi yesokunxele kububanzi obunikeziwe (i-pad char ezenzakalelayo isikhala)
builtins.td57: Isikhathi samanje njengeyunithi yezinhlamvu efundeka umuntu UTC

complex_type.cc6: I-Polar form: imele u-z ngobukhulu ne-engeli
complex_type.li5: Amandla: z**n isebenzisa ifomula ka-De Moivre yenombolo n
complex_type.p1: Inombolo eyinkimbinkimbi inefomu elithi a + bi, lapho a kuyingxenye yangempela futhi b ingxenye ecatshangelwayo. i iyunithi engokomfanekiso echazwa ngokuthi i² = −1. Izinombolo eziyinkimbinkimbi zinweba umugqa wangempela endizeni, okuvumela izixazululo zezibalo ezifana nokuthi x² + 1 = 0 ezingenayo impendulo yangempela.
complex_type.p2: Ku-Gravitix ubhala amagama angokomfanekiso ngesijobelelo esithi i:
complex_type.p3: Yonke imisebenzi emine eyisisekelo isebenza kumanani ayinkimbinkimbi ngokuqondile. Gravitix ilandela imithetho ejwayelekile yezibalo eziyinkimbinkimbi:
complex_type.p4: Ukucutshungulwa kwesignali (ukuhlaziywa komsindo, FFT), i-fractal generation (isethi ye-Mandelbrot), ukulingisa kwe-physics, izibalo zokuthikamezeka kukagesi, ne-quantum computing konke kudinga i-arithmetic eyinkimbinkimbi. Gravitix ikuvumela ukuthi usebenzise lezi zibalo khona kanye ngaphakathi kwe-Vortex bot ngaphandle kwemitapo yolwazi yangaphandle.
complex_type.td14: Kusuka kusimo se-polar: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ

ctx.td36: Iqiniso uma umlayezo uqukethe umsindo wezwi

emit.p1: Thumela umlayezo kunoma yimuphi umsebenzisi ngokuthi ID (uwusizo emisebenzini ehleliwe noma ekusakazweni komlawuli):

error.p1: Goqa noma iyiphi ikhodi engase yehluleke kubhulokhi try. Uma iphutha lithi thrown — kungaba Gravitix isikhathi sokusebenza noma ngokusobala ngekhodi yakho — ukwenza kugxumela kubhulokhi catch. Inani elibanjiwe liboshelwe kokuguquguqukayo okuqambe ngemuva kokuthi catch.
error.p2: finally isebenza ngaphandle kwemibandela — noma ngabe i-try iphumelele noma i-catch isingathe iphutha. Yisebenzise ukuze ukhulule izinsiza, ungene, noma uthumele umlayezo wokuqedela.
error.p3: Sebenzisa ukuphatha amaphutha emisebenzini encike kokokufaka kwangaphandle: ukuhlaziya umbhalo womsebenzisi, ukubiza ama-API, okuguquguqukayo kwendawo yokufunda, noma ukwenza izibalo eziyinkimbinkimbi lapho amaphutha esizinda (sqrt of negative, log of ziro) engenzeka khona. Ngamaphutha anengqondo angaphakathi, khetha guard izigatshana kanye no-return wangaphambi kwesikhathi.

examples.cc5: Yakha iyunithi yezinhlamvu yephrofayela ye-simple CSV
examples.p1: Ama-bots agcwele, asebenzayo abonisa amaphethini avamile.
examples.p2: I-bot simplest ewusizo kakhulu — iphinda every into eshiwo umsebenzisi.
examples.p3: I-simple bot ebala ukucindezela izinkinobho ngomsebenzisi ngamunye.
examples.p5: Umphathi womsebenzi womuntu ngamunye ngomsebenzisi ngamunye.

flows.cc1: imisa okwesikhashana lapha, iqala futhi lapho umsebenzisi ephendula
flows.p2: wait imisa okwesikhashana flow yamanje kuze kwenzeke umcimbi oshiwo. Inani lomcimbi returned:
flows.p3: Uma i-flow ishaya okuthi wait, ilondoloza zonke izinto eziguquguqukayo zendawo kanye nokumisa isikhashana. Lapho umsebenzisi ethumela umlayezo olandelayo, i-flow iqala kabusha lapho igcine khona. Lokhu kwenzeka ngokusobala - uvele ubhale ikhodi yomugqa.

functions.cc1: izingcingo ziyabingelela, akukho return inani elisetshenzisiwe
functions.p3: Memezela uhlobo return ngemva kuka--> futhi usebenzise return:
functions.p4: Sebenzisa abakaki be-engeli ezinhlotsheni ezijwayelekile kumapharamitha:
functions.p5: Umsebenzi ungawubizaself (ngokucophelela ukuze avoid ukuphindaphinda okungapheli):
functions.p6: Isikhathi sokusebenza siphoqelela ukujula kwekholi (okuvame ukuba ngu-200) ukuze kunqandwe ukunqwabelana ngaphezu koku-flow.

guard.p1: Uma umsebenzisi engeyena umlawuli, guard yesibambi sokuqala siyahluleka, futhi Gravitix iwela kusibambi sesibili.
guard.p2: Hlala uhlinzeka ngesibambi sokubuyela emuva ngaphandle kokuthi guard ukuze uphathe icala lapho zonke izibambi guarded zeqiwa. Lokhu kuqinisekisa ukuthi abasebenzisi bahlala bethola impendulo.

handlers.cc1: Lokhu kusebenza kuyo yonke eminye imilayezo yombhalo
handlers.cc2: ctx.umbhalo othi /echo sawubona umhlaba → "/echo sawubona mhlaba"
handlers.p1: Vortex imiyalo iqala ngokuthi /. Match nabo nge:
handlers.p2: Isebenzisa noma yimuphi umlayezo wombhalo ongenalutho (hhayi umyalo):
handlers.p3: Ungachaza izibambi eziningi ozidingayo. Zigijima ngokuzimela:
handlers.p4: Imiyalo ingafaka izimpikiswano. Umlayezo ogcwele (command + args) utholakala nge-ctx.text:
handlers.p5: Uma izibambi eziningi zikwazi match, zihlolwa ngokulandelana ezibhalwe ngazo. Owokuqala match uyawina. Isibambi esithi on msg sivamise ukugcina njengokubuyela emuva.
handlers.td10: Wonke umcimbi, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi uluphi uhlobo — catch-konke okubuyela emuva

if.p1: Ukusebenzisa okunemibandela: sebenzisa ikhodi ehlukile ngokuya ngesimo.
if.p2: Sebenzisa elif kumagatsha amaningi. Igatsha lokuqala matching kuphela elisebenza:
if.p3: Ukuzalanisa okujulile kwenza ikhodi ifundeke kanzima. Uncamela return kusenesikhathi ukuze wenze isicaba amagatsha:
if.p4: Noma isiphi isisho esihlola ukuthi bool sisebenza njengesimo:

intro.li2: Safe — izinhlobo ezimile catch amaphutha ngaphambi kwesikhathi sokusebenza
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, kanye nephethini matching zakhelwe ngaphakathi
intro.li4: Minimal — awekho amakilasi, awekho amafa, akukho zinhlaka okufanele zifundwe
intro.p1: Gravitix iwulimi oluqondene nesizinda (DSL) oluklanywe kusukela phansi ukuya phezulu ukuze lubhalwe Vortex bots. Lapho ezinye izilimi zidinga khona amalabhulali, ama-callbacks, ne-boilerplate, Gravitix ikunikeza izibambi zomcimbi ezisezingeni lokuqala, ingxoxo flows, kanye no-state okwakhelwe ngaphakathi — konke ku-syntax ehlanzekile, efundekayo egqugquzelwe ngu-Rust.
intro.p2: I-Gravitix eyanoma ubani ofuna ukwakha i-bot Vortex ngokushesha — kungakhathaliseki ukuthi awukaze ubhale ikhodi ngaphambilini, noma ungunjiniyela ongumakad' ebona okhathele Python nge-boilerplate. Lesi sithenjwa sifundisa Gravitix kusukela kuzimiso zokuqala: asikho ulwazi lwangaphambili oludingekayo.
intro.p3: Isigaba ngasinye sakhela kwezidlule. Uma umusha ekwenzeni izinhlelo, funda ukusuka phezulu kuye phansi. Uma usulwazi olunye ulimi, sebenzisa ithebula lokuqukethwe ukuze ugxumele kulokho okuthakaselayo.
intro.p4: Kuso sonke lesi sithenjwa, u-→ usho "ukuhlola ukuya" noma "ukukhiqiza", futhi u-// ... usho amazwana awanakwa umdidiyeli.

loops.p2: Isebenza inqobo nje uma isimo sikulokhu true:
loops.p3: Qiniseka ukuthi isimo ekugcineni siba false, noma sebenzisa break ukuze uphume. Isikhathi sokusebenza sivikela ezihibeni ezingapheli ngempela ezinomkhawulo wesinyathelo.
loops.p5: Sebenzisa u-range(start, end) ukuze ulandelele ngenombolo:

match.p1: _ i-wildcard — match yenza noma yini engazange match ingalo yangaphambili.
match.p3: Sebenzisa ibhulokhi { ... } uma udinga okungaphezu kokukodwa statement:

math_calculus.cc10: Indawo eyisiyingi ene-radius 1: kufanele ibe ngu-π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Inani elilindelekile: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx ngaphezu kokusabalalisa okuvamile
math_calculus.cc14: Uchungechunge luka-Taylor lwe-e^x cishe x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! +...
math_calculus.cc16: Isinyathelo sendlela ka-Newton: x₁ = x₀ − f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.p1: I-derivative f'(x) ikala ukuthi u-f ushintsha ngokushesha kangakanani endaweni x. Ngokwejiyomethrikhi iwumthambeka womugqa we-tangent. Gravitix isebenzisa umehluko omaphakathi kokuphuma kokunye kokuqala (iphutha O(h²)) kanye nefomula ye-oda lesibili kokuphuma kokunye kwesibili.
math_calculus.p2: I-integral ∫f(x)dx ukusuka ku-a ukuya ku-b indawo engaphansi kwejika. Gravitix inikeza izindlela ezintathu ngokunemba okwandayo:
math_calculus.td2: Okuphuma kokunye kokuqala endaweni ethi x

math_complex.cc4: Izimpande zobunye: izimpande ze-n-th zoku-1 zithi e^(2πik/n) kokuthi k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Ukuguqulwa kwe-Möbius kubeka imibuthano/imigqa ukuya emibuthanweni/imigqa
math_complex.li2: Impikiswano arg(z) = atan2(b, a) — i-engeli ukusuka ku-eksisi yangempela eyiphozithivu
math_complex.p1: Yonke inombolo eyinkimbinkimbi z = a + bi ingabonwa njengephoyinti (a, b) endizeni ethi Argand. I-eksisi evundlile iyi-eksisi yangempela, mpo i-eksisi ecatshangelwayo.
math_complex.p2: Obunye bobunikazi obubaluleke kakhulu kwizibalo: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. Lokhu kusho ukuthi indilinga yeyunithi endizeni eyinkimbinkimbi i-engeli x.
math_complex.p3: I-exponential eyinkimbinkimbi, i-sine, i-cosine, ne-logarithm inwetshwa kundiza eyinkimbinkimbi egcwele. Uchungechunge lwabo lwe-Taylor luhlangana everylapho (noma kudiski yelogi).
math_complex.p4: Kokuyinkimbinkimbi z kanye no-w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Lokhu kuvumela ama-exponents angewona aphelele nayinkimbinkimbi, okuveza ukuxhumana okumangazayo:
math_complex.td4: Igatsha likathishanhloko; engaqhubeki ku-eksisi yangempela eyinegethivu

math_core.p1: Yonke imisebenzi yokucupha ilindele ama-engeli kokuthi radians. Sebenzisa radians(deg) ukuguqula kusuka kumadigri.
math_core.td17: I-Tangent = sin/cos. Akuchazwa kokuthi π/2 + nπ
math_core.td21: I-engeli yevekhtha (x,y) ukusuka ku-positive x-eksisi. Ububanzi (−π, π]. Izibambo x=0.
math_core.td25: Guqula amadigri abe ama-radians: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Ilogi yemvelo (isisekelo e). ln(e) = 1, ln(1) = 0. Isizinda x > 0.
math_core.td27: Ilogi kanambambili. log₂(1024) = 10. Inani lamabhithi adingekayo.
math_core.td34: Ukuzungeza kuye kunamba eseduze (ingxenye ukusuka kuziro)
math_core.td39: Iqiniso uma |a−b| < eps (okuzenzakalelayo 1e-9). Iphephile float ukuqhathanisa.
math_core.td45: Ukuhumusha ngomugqa: a + t·(b−a). t=0→a, t=1→b
math_core.td46: Imephu x ukusuka ku-[a,b] ukuya ku-[c,d]

math_linalg.p1: I-vector iwuhlu olu-odwe lwezinombolo. Ingamela iphuzu esikhaleni, isiqondiso, isivinini, noma isici kokuthi ML.
math_linalg.p2: I-matrix iwuhlelo lwezinombolo ezingu-2D. I-matrix ye-m×n inemigqa engu-m namakholomu n. Matrix imisebenzi yakha umnyombo wokuguqulwa komugqa.
math_linalg.td1: Umkhiqizo wamachashazi: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. Umphumela uba isikala. ichashazi(a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix ukuphindaphinda (A ngu-m×k, B ngu-k×n → umphumela m×n)
math_linalg.td14: I-matrix ephambene A⁻¹ kangangokuthi A·A⁻¹ = I (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td19: Xazulula i-linear system Ax = b ngokusebenzisa ukuqedwa kwe-Gaussian
math_linalg.td2: Umkhiqizo ophambanayo wamavekhtha amabili e-3D. Umphumela ⊥ kokubili okokufaka. |a×b| = |a||b|isono θ
math_linalg.td4: Ivekhtha yeyunithi: v / |v|. Ubude buba ngu-1.

math_numth.cc4: Goldbach isihloli sokuqagela: every ngisho n>2 iyisamba sezinhlamvu ezimbili zokuqala
math_numth.td1: Isihlukanisi esivamile kakhulu nge-algorithm ye-Euclidean. gcd(12,8)=4
math_numth.td19: Izinombolo ezinyakazayo zohlobo lwesibili: izingxenye ze-n zibe amasethi angaphansi angenalutho
math_numth.td21: Izinombolo zesiCatalan: ukulandelana kwabakaki, izihlahla kanambambili
math_numth.td3: Zonke izahlukanisi ezinhle ze-n, zihlungiwe. abahlukanisi(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: I-totient ka-Euler φ(n): ukubala izinombolo ku-[1,n] coprime ukuya ku-n
math_numth.td5: Okuphambene nemojuli: x kangangokuthi a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Isetshenziswe kokuthi RSA.
math_numth.td6: Ukuchayeka kwe-modular okusheshayo: isisekelo^exp mod. O(log exp).
math_numth.td8: Zonke primes kufika n nge Sieve of Eratosthenes

math_special.cc3: I-Apéry's constant: ζ(3) ayinangqondo kodwa ayikho indlela evaliwe eyaziwayo
math_special.cc4: I-J₀(x): i-oscillates nokubola - ichaza amagagasi e-radial
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): yehluka kokuthi x=0, i-oscillates ngo-x omkhulu
math_special.cc6: I-Ai ibola ngokuphawulekayo ku-x→+∞, i-oscillates yokuthi x→-∞
math_special.p1: Umsebenzi Gamma Γ(n) uwukwenziwa kwangempela okuqhubekayo kwe-factorial: Γ(n) = (n−1)! ngamanani aphelele. Inweba izinombolo ezingokoqobo neziyinkimbinkimbi.
math_special.p2: Umsebenzi wephutha u-erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt uyingxenye ye-Gaussian. Ihlobene ngokuqondile nokujwayelekile CDF futhi ivela kuzibalo zokushisa kanye nethiyori yamathuba.
math_special.p3: ζ(izi) = Σ 1/nˢ kokuthi n=1,2,3,… (uma Re(izi)>1). Ixhuma ekusabalaliseni okuyinhloko ngomkhiqizo we-Euler. I-Riemann Hypothesis (engaxazululiwe!) iphathelene noziro be-ζ endizeni eyinkimbinkimbi.
math_special.p4: Imisebenzi ye-Bessel ethi Jₙ(x) kanye no-Yₙ(x) yizixazululo zezibalo ezihlukanisayo ze-Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. Zivela ekusakazeni kwamagagasi, ukuqhutshwa kokushisa kumasilinda, kanye nemishini ye-quantum.
math_special.p5: I-Ai(x) kanye no-Bi(x) ayizixazululo kokuthi y'' = xy. Zivela ku-quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) kanye ne-optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: Le mindeni ye-polynomial ivela njengama-eigenfunctions ama-opharetha abalulekile futhi isetshenziswa ezindleleni ze-spectral, i-quadrature, ne-quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: U-K(k) kanye no-E(k) ayizingqayizivele eziphelele zohlobo lokuqala nolwesibili. Babala isikhathi se-pendulum engaqondile kanye ne-perimeter ye-ellipse.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): i-orthogonal ku- [−1,1]. Ingxenye eyi-angular ye-hydrogen wavefunctions.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): i-orthogonal w.r.t. e^(−x²). I-Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): i-orthogonal ku-[0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Imisebenzi ye-Hydrogen radial wave.

math_stats.cc2: Iyiphi ingxenye yabantu abathola amaphuzu angaphansi kuka-600 kokuthi SAT (μ=500, σ=100)?
math_stats.cc3: Amathuba amakhanda angu-3 ncamashi ekuphendukeni kohlamvu lwemali oluyi-10
math_stats.cc4: Isilinganiso samakhasimende/umzuzu angu-2, amathuba okuthi ncamashi 5 ngomzuzu?
math_stats.li1: r = 1: ubuhlobo obuhle obuphelele (njengoba u-X ekhula, u-Y ukhula ngokulinganayo)
math_stats.p1: Njengoba kunikezwe uhlu lwezinombolo, le misebenzi ifingqa ukuthambekela okumaphakathi kwedatha nokusabalala:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] ikala ukuthi ukuguquguquka okubili kuhamba ndawonye. Ukuxhumana r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) kwenza lokhu kube ngokwejwayelekile ukuze kube [−1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) ilingana nomugqa ongcono kakhulu y = a + bx ngokusebenzisa amaphuzu edatha kusetshenziswa izikwele ezijwayelekile okungenani. Ibuyisela [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) yokusabalalisa okuvamile. Isebenzisa ukulinganiselwa kwesiza.
math_stats.td15: Isampuli esuka ku-N(μ,σ) kusetshenziswa ukuguqulwa kwe-Box-Muller
math_stats.td3: Inani eliphakathi uma lihlungwa. Ngokulinganayo n, isilinganiso samanani amabili amaphakathi.
math_stats.td5: Isilinganiso sokuchezuka kwesikwele ukusuka kuncazelo: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td8: Yenza kube ku-ziro ukuhluka kweyunithi yencazelo: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

math_transforms.cc1: Hlanganisa isignali: isamba esingu-440Hz kanye namaza anesine angu-880Hz
math_transforms.cc10: Thola imvamisa ephezulu kudatha enikezwe umsebenzisi
math_transforms.cc11: Isihlungi se-low-pass: zero out high-frequency bin
math_transforms.cc2: (isilinganiso sesampula = amasampula angu-8 edemo, ukusetshenziswa kwangempela kungaba ngu-44100)
math_transforms.cc6: I-Convolution: sebenzisa isihlungi sebhokisi (isilinganiso esihambayo) ukuze bushelelezi idatha
math_transforms.cc8: Uhambo olubuyayo: fft → ifft kufanele ilulame okwangempela
math_transforms.li3: I-FFT ibala umphumela ofanayo njengokuthi DFT kodwa kokuthi O(n log n) vs O(n²) — ku-n=1024 lokho kungukusebenza okungu-1024 vs 1 million
math_transforms.p1: Uma kunikezwe ukulandelana kwamasampuli angu-N x[0], x[1], …, x[N-1], i-Discrete Fourier Transform ikhiqiza i-N complex frequency components X[k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 kanye AAC ukuminyanisa komsindo, JPEG ukuminyanisa isithombe, ukudluliswa okungenantambo kwe-5G, ukucubungula isignali yerada, kanye MRI nokubonwa kabusha kwesithombestruct konke kuncike ku-FFT algorithm. Ukuyiqonda kukunikeza ukuqonda ngengxenyana enkulu yobuchwepheshe besimanje.
math_transforms.td1: I-Fast Fourier Transform (Cooley-Tukey). xs: uhlu lwe-floats noma oluyinkimbinkimbi. Ibuyisela uhlu lokuyinkimbinkimbi. Okungcono kakhulu ku-N = amandla angu-2.
math_transforms.td2: Okuphambene FFT. Reconstructs isignali yesizinda sesikhathi kusukela ku-spectrum.
math_transforms.td3: I-Naive O(n²) DFT. Umphumela ofanayo ne-ftt, usebenza kunoma iyiphi i-N.
math_transforms.td4: Ukuguqulwa: (a★b)[n] = Σₖ a[k]·b[n−k]. Kusetshenziswe FIR izihlungi.
math_transforms.td5: Linganisa i-Laplace transform polynomial at complex s

operators.p4: Sebenzisa abakaki ukuze ukhiphe: (a + b) * c.

pipe.cc3: Ilingana ne: trim(ofeleba abancane(" HELLO WORLD "))
pipe.cc6: hlukanisa(intambo, isihlukanisi) — iyunithi yezinhlamvu piped in
pipe.cc7: buyisela(intambo, isuka, iye) — iyunithi yezinhlamvu piped in
pipe.p1: Uma umsebenzi udinga i-agumenti engaphezu kweyodwa, inani elithi piped liba i-agumenti ethi first kanti amanye angena kubakaki:
pipe.p2: Ngaphandle kokuthi pipe — izingcingo ezifakwe esidlekeni, zifundeka ngaphakathi:

quickstart.li1: on /start { ... } — ichaza isibambi esisebenza lapho umsebenzisi ethumela /start
quickstart.li3: {ctx.first_name} — ihumusha igama lokuqala lomsebenzisi kuyunithi yezinhlamvu
quickstart.p1: Dala ifayela elisha elibizwa ngokuthi main.grav bese ubhala:
quickstart.p2: Ku-Gravitix IDE, chofoza inkinobho ethi Run ▶ kubha ephezulu. Faka Vortex i-Bot Token yakho uma utshelwa. I-bot iqala ngokushesha - asikho isinyathelo sokwakha esidingekayo.
quickstart.p3: Iphrojekthi Gravitix uhla lwemibhalo olulodwa oluqukethe .grav amafayela. Iphoyinti lokungena lihlala liyifayela okhetha ukulisebenzisa.
quickstart.p4: state { ... } imemezela okuguquguqukayo okuqhubekayo okukhona kuyo yonke imilayezo. Lokhu sikuhlanganisa ngokujulile esigabeni esithi State Management.

schedule.p1: Izikhathi kokuthi at ziku-UTC. Uma abasebenzisi bakho basendaweni yesikhathi ehlukile, lungisa ngokufanele (isb., UTC+3 abasebenzisi: sebenzisa u-"06:00" ngo-9 AM wasendaweni).

state.p1: Sebenzisa ibhulokhi state { } ezingeni eliphezulu lefayela lakho:
state.p2: Inkambu ngayinye inegama, uhlobo, kanye nenani elizenzakalelayo (elisetshenziswa lapho i-bot iqala).
state.p3: State amanani ayasinda phakathi kwemilayezo naphakathi kokuqalwa kabusha kwe-bot. Agcinwa kudiski ngokuzenzakalelayo.
state.p5: Amamephu ku-state alungele idatha yomsebenzisi ngamunye:

strings.cc17: Indlela yokuhlanganisa ifundeka ngokwemvelo ukusuka kwesokunxele kuye kwesokudla:
strings.p1: Bhala iyunithi yezinhlamvu phakathi kwezingcaphuno ezimbili:
strings.p2: Shumeka noma yisiphi isisho ngaphakathi kokuthi {} ngaphakathi kweyunithi yezinhlamvu:
strings.p3: Ungafaka noma yisiphi isisho esivumelekile ngaphakathi kokuthi { } — izingcingo ezisebenzayo, izibalo, iziqhathaniso. Awukho umkhawulo kubunzima.
strings.p4: Sebenzisa izingcaphuno eziphindwe kathathu """...""" kumayunithi ezinhlamvu ahlanganisa imigqa eminingi:
strings.p5: Izintambo ezicashuniwe kathathu zigcina yonke indawo emhlophe nemigqa emisha njengoba ibhaliwe. I-interpolation {} isebenza ngaphakathi kuzo ngendlela efanayo.
strings.p6: Ungashayela imisebenzi eminingi yezintambo usebenzisa i-dot notation - zombili izitayela ziyalingana:

structs.p1: Sebenzisa impl TypeName { ... } ukuze unamathisele izindlela ku-struct. Ngaphakathi kwendlela, self ibhekisela kusibonelo.
structs.p2: Enums chaza uhlobo olungase lube okukodwa kokuhlukile okumbalwa. Okuhlukile kungase kube sobala (njengama-constants) noma kuphathe idatha.

syntax.cc2: Iyunithi yezinhlamvu ene-interpolation — {expression} ithathelwa indawo inani layo
syntax.li1: on <trigger> — khetha ukuthi yimuphi umcimbi oxosha isibambi
syntax.li2: emit <value> — thumela umlayezo; inani liwuchungechunge, okuhlukile, nanoma yisiphi isisho
syntax.li3: Imigqa eminingi emit → imiyalezo eminingi ehlukene eya kumsebenzisi
syntax.li4: Izibambi eziningi ze-trigger efanayo → kuhlolwe ukusuka phezulu kuye phansi, kuqala match ukuwina
syntax.p1: I-trigger itshela i-bot nini ukuthi iqalise umzimba wesibambi:
syntax.p2: emit ithumela umlayezo kumsebenzisi. Ngemva kwayo ubeka inani lokuthumela:
syntax.p3: I-emit ngayinye ithumela umlayezo ohlukile. Bafika belandelana:
syntax.p4: Ungabhala izibambi on /command ezimbalwa. Zihlolwa ngokulandelana kwazo — eyokuqala okuhamba kwayo guard. Bona Guard Izigatshana ukuze uthole imininingwane.
syntax.td1: Noma yimuphi umlayezo wombhalo ongenalutho (hhayi umyalo)
syntax.td10: Iyunithi yezinhlamvu enenani lamanje elithi state

types.cc9: State inkambu eqala null ize yabelwe
types.p1: Inombolo ephelele esayiniwe engamabhithi angu-64. Isekela amanani ukusuka cishe ku-−9.2 × 10¹⁸ ukuya ku-+9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Amanye amanani angase abe engekho. Izinkambu ozikhethela kokuthi ctx (njenge-ctx.username) zingaba null. Njalo hlola ngaphambi kokusebenzisa:
types.p11: Ukwengeza okuthi ? ngemva kohlobo oluthile kukumaka ongakukhetha — inani lingase libe ngu-null. Lena yindlela amapharamitha okusebenza kanye nezinkambu state eziveza ngayo ukuthi "lokhu kungase kube khona noma kungabi khona":
types.p12: Uma inani lingase lingabi khona ngaso sonke isikhathi, lichaze T? futhi njalo hlola != null ngaphambi kokulisebenzisa. Ukufinyelela kunkambu ethi null akuyiphazamisi i-bot — it returns null buthule.
types.p3: 10 / 3 enamanani amabili int inikeza 3 (okuncishisiwe). Sebenzisa 10.0 / 3.0 ukuthola imiphumela yedesimali.
types.p5: Iyunithi yezinhlamvu yombhalo we-Unicode. Izintambo zingamanani angenakuguquleka.
types.p6: Ukulandelana okuhlelekile kwamanani, wonke aluhlobo olufanayo T.
types.p7: Ukufinyelela inkomba engaphandle kwebanga (isb., nums[99] lapho uhlu lunezici ezingu-5) returns null kunokuphahlazeka i-bot yakho.
types.p8: Iqoqo lamapheya enani elingukhiye. Okhiye kufanele bonke babe uhlobo olufanayo, amanani kufanele wonke abe uhlobo olufanayo.
types.p9: Uhlobo return lwemisebenzi olunganalo return inani. Awuvamisile ukubhala void ngokusobala — kuba okumisiwe lapho kucacisiwe uhlobo lwe-return.

variables.p1: Okuguquguqukayo gcina amanani ongawasebenzisa futhi uwashintshe kulo lonke uhlelo lwakho.
variables.p3: Umhlanganisi ufaka uhlobo olusuka enanini elingakwesokudla. Awudingi ukubhala uhlobo ngokucacile — kodwa wena can.
variables.p5: Izichasiselo zingokuzithandela — zisebenzise uma uhlobo lungabonakali enanini, noma lapho ufuna ikhodi ukuthi self-ibhalwe phansi.
variables.p6: Okuguquguqukayo kuyaguquleka ngokuzenzakalela. Nikeza inani elisha ngokuthi =:
variables.p8: Okuguquguqukayo kukhona phakathi kwebhulokhi { } okumenyezelwe kuyo. Azibonakali ngaphandle kwaleyo bhulokhi:

wizard.title: Ukusethwa kweNode
wizard.nodeDesc: Setha igama ledivayisi nembobo. Le datha izobonakala kwamanye ama-node kunethiwekhi yendawo.
wizard.networkDesc: Khetha ukuthi i-node yakho izosebenza kanjani.
wizard.netLocalDesc: Wi-Fi / LAN. Isebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi. Amadivayisi atholana ngokuzenzakalelayo.
wizard.netGlobalDesc: Nge-inthanethi. Cloudflare Umhubhe + i-traffic obfuscation. Ukufinyelela kusuka noma yikuphi emhlabeni.
wizard.cfNotFound: cloudflared ayitholakali. Yifake ukuze unike amandla imodi yomhlaba.
wizard.sslDesc: Khetha ukuthi usithola kanjani isitifiketi HTTPS. Inconyelwe ukusebenza okugcwele kwesiphequluli (umbhobho, ikhamera, WebRTC).
wizard.sslSelfDesc: Ikhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalela, isebenza ngo-LAN ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi
wizard.sslLeDesc: Isitifiketi esithenjiwe samahhala. Idinga isizinda kanye nembobo 80.
wizard.sslNoneDesc: HTTP kuphela. Ezinye izici zesiphequluli kungenzeka zingatholakali.
wizard.adminPasswordHint: Iyadingeka CA ukufakwa esitolo sokuthembana sesistimu. Iphasiwedi isetshenziswa kanye futhi ayigcinwa.
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert idala izitifiketi ezithenjwayo endaweni ngaphandle kwezixwayiso zesiphequluli. Imahhala ngokuphelele, isebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
wizard.domainHint: Isizinda kufanele sikhombe kule seva IP
wizard.stagingHint: Ayisebenzisi LE imikhawulo yesilinganiso, isitifiketi ngeke sithenjwe
wizard.noSslWarning: Ngaphandle kokuthi HTTPS: imakrofoni/ikhamera yamakholi, izaziso, i-geolocation ngeke itholakale. Ezinye iziphequluli zivimba WebSocket ngaphandle kokuthi SSL.
wizard.authDesc: Lungiselela izindlela zokungena zabasebenzisi benodi yakho. Ungeqa lokhu futhi uwengeze kamuva kuzilungiselelo.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Ngena ngemvume usebenzisa i-biometrics, Thinta ID noma PIN. Awekho amasevisi angaphandle adingekayo — isebenza ngesiphequluli/OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Konke kubukeka kulungile? Izilungiselelo zizolondolozwa kufayela le-.env ngemva kokuqaliswa.
wizard.launchedDesc: Ukusetha wizadi kuqedile. Ivula isixhumi esibonakalayo esiyinhloko...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Faka iphasiwedi yomlawuli ukuze uyifake CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA ifakwe esitolo sokuthembana sohlelo — qala kabusha isiphequluli sakho
wizard.sslSkipped: SSL yeqiwe. I-Node izosebenza ngomhla ka-HTTP.

onboarding.step1Text: Chofoza lapha ukuze udale igumbi elisha lengxoxo
onboarding.step2Text: Yabelana ngale khodi nabangani ukuze ubameme
onboarding.step3Text: Thayipha umlayezo wakho wokuqala bese ucindezela u-Enter
onboarding.step4Text: Yonke imilayezo ibethelwe — nguwena kuphela nomamukeli eningakwazi ukuyifunda
onboarding.step5Text: Hlola Vortex — dala amagumbi, engeza abathintwayo, hlela ngokwezifiso izilungiselelo

permissions.customHint: Khipha izimvume ezizenzakalelayo zaleli lungu. Lezi zisebenza kungakhathaliseki indima yazo.
permissions.canManageCallsDesc: Angaqala, aqede, futhi aphathe amakholi weqembu
